allow: PowerShell(conda create *)
PowerShell(conda activate *)

PowerShell($body = @{media_roots = @\("F:\\媒体库\\电影"\)} | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/settings" -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/scan" -Method Post; Write-Host "Total: $\($result.total\)"; Write-Host "Added: $\($result.added\)"; Write-Host "Updated: $\($result.updated\)"; Write-Host "Deleted: $\($result.deleted\)"; Write-Host "Errors: $\($result.errors.Count\)"; if \($result.errors.Count -gt 0\) { $result.errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  Error: $_" } })
PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movies" -Method Get; $response.Content | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell($posterPath = [uri]::EscapeDataString\("F:\\媒体库\\电影\\肖申克的救赎 \(1994\)\\肖申克的救赎 \(1994\)-poster.jpg"\); $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/poster?path=$posterPath" -Method Get; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content-Type: $\($response.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Host "Size: $\($response.RawContentLength\) bytes")
PowerShell(Stop-Process *)
PowerShell(Remove-Item *)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $movies = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movies" -Method Get; Write-Host "Movies count: $\($movies.count\)"; $m = $movies.movies[0]; Write-Host "Movie 1: $\($m.title\) \($\($m.year\)\)"; Write-Host "Poster: $\($m.poster_path.Substring\($m.poster_path.Length-20\)\)"; $posterEncoded = [uri]::EscapeDataString\($m.poster_path\); $imgResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/poster?path=$posterEncoded"; Write-Host "Poster img status: $\($imgResp.StatusCode\) type: $\($imgResp.Headers['Content-Type']\) size: $\($imgResp.RawContentLength\)")

PowerShell($result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/scan" -Method Post; Write-Host "Total: $\($result.total\) Added: $\($result.added\) Updated: $\($result.updated\) Deleted: $\($result.deleted\) Errors: $\($result.errors.Count\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $m = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movies"; Write-Host "Movies: $\($m.count\)"; Write-Host "Title: $\($m.movies[0].title\)"; Write-Host "Genre: $\($m.movies[0].genre\)"; Write-Host "Has poster: $\(if\($m.movies[0].poster_path\){'yes'}else{'no'}\)"; $enc = [uri]::EscapeDataString\($m.movies[0].poster_path\); $img = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:5000/poster?path=$enc"; Write-Host "Poster: $\($img.StatusCode\) $\($img.Headers['Content-Type']\) $\($img.RawContentLength\)bytes")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem *)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media" -Method Get; Write-Output "Total media: $\($r.count\)"; $types = $r.media | Group-Object media_type; foreach \($g in $types\) { Write-Output "  $\($g.Name\): $\($g.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/shows" -Method Get; Write-Output "Shows count: $\($r.count\)"; $r.shows | Select-Object id, title, year, season_count | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/shows/8/episodes" -Method Get; Write-Output "Show: $\($r.show.title\)"; Write-Output "Seasons: $\($r.seasons -join ', '\)"; Write-Output "Episodes: $\($r.episodes.Count\)"; $r.episodes | Select-Object season, episode, title, is_watched | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/episodes/1/watched" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body "{}"; Write-Output "Watched toggle result: episode=$\($r.episode_id\), is_watched=$\($r.is_watched\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/episodes/1/watched" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body "{}"; Write-Output "Toggled back: is_watched=$\($r2.is_watched\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media?type=tvshow" -Method Get; Write-Output "TV Shows only: $\($r.count\)"; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media?type=movie" -Method Get; Write-Output "Movies only: $\($r.count\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/shows/8/favorite" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body "{}"; Write-Output "Favorited show 8: is_favorite=$\($r.is_favorite\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media?favorite=true" -Method Get; Write-Output "Favorites count: $\($r2.count\)"; $r2.media | Select-Object media_type, title | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(cd d:\\project\\localplayer; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '__pycache__|\\.db$' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("$pwd\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)
PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Count)
PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media?search=test" -Method Get -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host \("Search results: " + $r.Count\))
PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/browse-folder" -Method Post -Body "{}" -ContentType "application/json" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host \("Browse folder: " + $r.path\))
PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media" -Method Get -UseBasicParsing; $r.StatusCode)

PowerShell($body = @{} | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/browse-folder" -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $r.StatusCode; $r.Content)

PowerShell(cd d:\\project\\localplayer; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch '__pycache__|\\.db$|localplayer\\.db-shm|localplayer\\.db-wal' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("$pwd\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)
PowerShell(Get-Item *)
PowerShell(\(Get-Content "D:\\project\\localplayer\\static\\app.js" | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "d:\\project\\localplayer\\logs\\error.log"\) { Write-Host "error.log exists: $\(Get-Item 'd:\\project\\localplayer\\logs\\error.log'\).Length bytes" } else { Write-Host "error.log NOT found" }; if \(Test-Path "d:\\project\\localplayer\\logs\\app.log"\) { Write-Host "app.log exists: $\(Get-Item 'd:\\project\\localplayer\\logs\\app.log'\).Length bytes" } else { Write-Host "app.log NOT found" })

PowerShell($res1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -Method Head; Write-Host "Home: $\($res1.StatusCode\)"; $res2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/static/style.css" -Method Head; Write-Host "CSS: $\($res2.StatusCode\)"; $res3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/static/app.js" -Method Head; Write-Host "JS: $\($res3.StatusCode\)"; $res4 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/all_media" -Method Head; Write-Host "API all_media: $\($res4.StatusCode\)"; $res5 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movie/1/fanart" -Method Head; Write-Host "Movie 1 fanart: $\($res5.StatusCode\)"; $res6 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/show/1/fanart" -Method Head; Write-Host "Show 1 fanart: $\($res6.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($res1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -Method Head; Write-Host "Home: $\($res1.StatusCode\)"; $res2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/static/style.css" -Method Head; Write-Host "CSS: $\($res2.StatusCode\)"; $res3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/static/app.js" -Method Head; Write-Host "JS: $\($res3.StatusCode\)"; $res4 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movies" -Method Head; Write-Host "Movies API: $\($res4.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "App not running, starting..."; cd d:\\project\\localplayer; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "app.py" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3 })
PowerShell(node --check "d:\\project\\localplayer\\static\\app.js" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Process *)

PowerShell($html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTML: $\($html.StatusCode\) \($\($html.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; $js = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/static/app.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "app.js: $\($js.StatusCode\) \($\($js.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/static/style.css" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "style.css: $\($css.StatusCode\) \($\($css.Content.Length\) bytes\)"; $api = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/media" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "API /api/media: $\($api.StatusCode\) \($\($api.Content.Length\) bytes\)")

PowerShell($movies = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movies" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Movies: $\($movies.StatusCode\) - $\($movies.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $movies.Content.Length\)\)\)"; $shows = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/shows" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Shows: $\($shows.StatusCode\) - $\($shows.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $shows.Content.Length\)\)\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movies" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Movies count: $\($r.count\)"; if \($r.movies.Count -gt 0\) { $m = $r.movies[0]; Write-Output "First movie ID: $\($m.id\), title: $\($m.title\)"; $detail = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/movies/$\($m.id\)" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Detail keys: $\($detail.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/shows" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Shows count: $\($r.count\)"; if \($r.shows.Count -gt 0\) { $s = $r.shows[0]; Write-Output "First show ID: $\($s.id\), title: $\($s.title\)" } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
Bash(conda info *)
Bash(git push *)
